Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Emacs internals: Deconstructing Lisp_Object in C (Part 2) 66 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Dumping Lego NXT firmware off of an existing brick (2025) 199 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. Compiling Prolog to Forth [pdf] 111 upvotes, 9 comments
  4. CasNum 275 upvotes, 36 comments
  5. In 1985 Maxell built a bunch of life-size robots for its bad floppy ad 107 upvotes, 13 comments
  6. macOS code injection for fun and no profit (2024) 92 upvotes, 15 comments
  7. From RGB to L*a*b* color space (2024) 24 upvotes, 2 comments
  8. SWE-CI: Evaluating Agent Capabilities in Maintaining Codebases via CI 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Lisp-style C++ template meta programming 45 upvotes, 7 comments
  10. How to run Qwen 3.5 locally 122 upvotes, 28 comments
  11. To the Polypropylene Makers 25 upvotes, 3 comments
  12. FLASH radiotherapy's bold approach to cancer treatment 208 upvotes, 62 comments
  13. Autoresearch: Agents researching on single-GPU nanochat training automatically 109 upvotes, 29 comments
  14. "Warn about PyPy being unmaintained" 155 upvotes, 45 comments
  15. The surprising whimsy of the Time Zone Database 113 upvotes, 35 comments
  16. LLM Writing Tropes.md 185 upvotes, 74 comments
  17. Ten years of deploying to production 24 upvotes, 5 comments
  18. Cloud VM benchmarks 2026 211 upvotes, 95 comments
  19. Re-creating the complex cuisine of prehistoric Europeans 78 upvotes, 32 comments
  20. Show HN: Curiosity – DIY 6" Newtonian Reflector Telescope 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Yoghurt delivery women combatting loneliness in Japan 278 upvotes, 151 comments
  22. Files are the interface humans and agents interact with 216 upvotes, 117 comments
  23. Show HN: A weird thing that detects your pulse from the browser video 71 upvotes, 37 comments
  24. MonoGame: A .NET framework for making cross-platform games 69 upvotes, 38 comments
  25. A decade of Docker containers 293 upvotes, 202 comments
  26. A Grand Vision for Rust 51 upvotes, 38 comments
  27. Best performance of a C++ singleton 29 upvotes, 22 comments
  28. How important was the Battle of Hastings? 31 upvotes, 28 comments
  29. New Research Reassesses the Value of Agents.md Files for AI Coding 8 upvotes, 7 comments
  30. Digital Iris [video] 3 upvotes, 1 comments

Last generated 5:00pm, 8 March 2026. Source here.
